name: fifa-stadium-hotel-planner
description: FIFA World Cup 26 U.S. stadium hotel planner: find nearby hotels, collect map coordinates/reviews, compute stadium-to-hotel travel distance, and produce Google Map pins. Routed via SELAT Router.

venue_query.description: Common stadium name plus city/state, used for text searches and labels.

hotel_query.default: hotels near MetLife Stadium East Rutherford NJ
hotel_query.description: Search query for nearby hotel candidates.

hotel_address.default: Hyatt Place Secaucus Meadowlands, Secaucus, NJ
hotel_address.description: Selected hotel name/address for review lookup and route scoring.

venue_lat.description: Venue latitude for map, nearby search, and distance matrix steps.

venue_lng.description: Venue longitude for map, nearby search, and distance matrix steps.

hotel_lat.description: Selected hotel latitude for map and distance matrix steps.

hotel_lng.description: Selected hotel longitude for map and distance matrix steps.

radius_meters.description: Nearby-search radius around the stadium, in meters.

map_zoom.description: Google Static Maps zoom level for the stadium-plus-hotel preview.

steps.label: hotel candidates with coordinates - Serper Maps (routed MPP)
hotel place details - Serper Places (routed MPP)
selected hotel reviews - Serper Reviews (routed MPP)
lodging near stadium - Google Places Nearby Search (routed MPP)
stadium to hotel walking distance - Google Maps Distance Matrix (routed MPP)
stadium and selected hotel pin map - Google Static Maps (routed MPP)
